title: GoPro Wireless Mic System review: An audio upgrade with fixable flaws - Engadget
summary: The lack of on-board recording and advanced features like 32-bit float put the Wireless Mic System in the same bucket as DJI's Mic Mini 2 and Rode's Wireless Micro camera kit .
